archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Tactical Control Room Twist
design_philosophy: Smart City Command Center. High-contrast visibility, dense data visualization via Bento grids, zero decorative fluff. Use color strictly to convey traffic status and warnings.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-none
scales.label: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-muted

surfaces.card: bg-surface border border-white/10 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-inverse bg-primary hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors rounded-md
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-primary bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white/40 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors rounded-md
buttons.danger: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-white bg-signals-red hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors rounded-md

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-mono font-medium

inputs.text: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-white/10 bg-surface/50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-primary placeholder:text-muted focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50 focus:border-transparent transition-all
inputs.upload_area: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-64 border-2 border-dashed border-white/20 rounded-xl bg-surface hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all cursor-pointer

hero_background.description: Abstract circular radar pattern representing data monitoring
hero_background.usage: Landing page hero section background (overlay with bg-black/70)

demo_traffic_night.description: Aerial view of city intersection at night
demo_traffic_night.usage: Example image in the history list or 'how it works' section

demo_traffic_day.usage: Mock AI detection results background image

avatar_police.usage: Dashboard profile avatar for Police Officer role

landing.structure: Hero (Nav + Headline + CTA + BG image) -> Features (Bento Grid) -> How it Works (Steps) -> Footer
landing.notes: Hero must have stark contrast. Headline text-6xl, neon cyan accent on keywords. Background must have a black overlay to ensure readability.

auth.structure: Split screen. Left: Branding/Image, Right: Login/Register form with Role selection toggle (User, Police, Analyzer).
auth.notes: Role selector should be visual cards with icons, not just a dropdown.

dashboard_layout.structure: Top Nav (Logo, Role Badge, Avatar) -> Main Content Area (Sidebar optional, Top metrics row, Main content grid)
dashboard_layout.notes: Top Nav must be sticky Glassmorphism (bg-surface/70 blur).

upload_panel.structure: Card -> Dashed Upload Area -> File Info -> Analyze Button
upload_panel.notes: On successful upload, transition seamlessly to Detection Results view.

detection_results.structure: Grid Layout. Left Column (span-2): Annotated Image view. Right Column (span-1): Density Meter, Vehicle Counts list, Signal Recommendation card.
detection_results.notes: Bounding boxes over image should use neon colors (cyan, magenta, yellow). Signal recommendation card must clearly display Red/Yellow/Green phases using the 'signals' color palette.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid. Use kebab-case, role-based naming.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette provided. Do not invent new gradients.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and JetBrains Mono for all numeric data and labels. Import these from Google Fonts/Fontshare.
Wrap grid items correctly to avoid layout breakage on mobile.
Use Lucide-React for all icons, keeping stroke width consistent.
For the bounding box AI overlay, use absolutely positioned divs over the demo image with thin neon borders (border-primary).
Include 'data-testid' on every button, link, and input as per the guidelines.
Ensure the Signal Recommendation Card uses actual glowing colors from the 'signals' object (e.g. shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,214,160,0.5)] for a green signal).
